headlines.title: NASA’s Hubble Captures Crimson Cloud Sparkling with White, Blue Stars
headlines.summary: Blue and white stars shine brightly against crimson gas in this image from NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope.

headlines.title: NASA’s Hubble Spots Star-Spangled Cosmic Scene
headlines.summary: More than 500,000 stars blaze red, white, and blue in this NASA Hubble image of the globular cluster Messier 3 (M3).
